message:
chore: replace specific scratch test filenames with glob pattern in .gitignore

Replace individual test_diff.rs and test_edit_tool.rs entries with the
glob pattern /test_*.rs to catch all root-level scratch test files
generated by agents during debugging and reproduction sessions.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -120,5 +120,5 @@ panic_grep*.txt
 rust-bug-scan.txt
 parse_*.py
 tests.log
-test_diff.rs
-test_edit_tool.rs
+# Root-level scratch test files (agent-generated debug/repro harnesses)
+/test_*.rs
